steps.title: Use the conservation contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts a single-species approach with an ecosystem-based approach. The newer view says conservation should consider interactions among climate, terrain, and multiple species in a location. If that view is right, a strategy focused only on M. boolii would be too narrow.

steps.title: Name what the narrow focus misses
steps.content: Choice A discusses distribution of Mammillaria species, Choice B adds unsupported competition effects, and Choice C says the single-species approach shifts focus away from M. boolii even though it focuses on that species. The answer is D.
